title: thelypteris celebornii
intro: Thelypteris celebornii, also known as the Celeborn's maiden fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It is a type of vascular plant that is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Thelypteris celebornii include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that have been reported to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and promoting wound healing.
